chain.thought: Explanation: To determine which athlete set the most records outside the United States, count the entries where the location is not in the United States for each athlete. Bobby Morrow (Melbourne, Australia), Manfred Germar (Wuppertal, Germany), Peter Radford (Wolverhampton, United Kingdom), Tommie Smith (Mexico City, Mexico), and Donald Quarrie (Cali, Colombia) each have 1 record outside the U.S. Livio Berruti has 2 records outside the U.S., both in Rome, Italy on September 3, 1960. Therefore, Livio Berruti set the most records in a country other than the United States.
